pros: In the virtual world very nice this experience

description: I love the quality of the business and the product.
author: Autumn B.
pros: I love the quality and the brand it is amazing quality.
cons: There is nothing that I don't like about the product.

author: Kunle A.
pros: Brush, Powder they are soft and subtle in nature
cons: the concealers can be sometimes harsh thereby making me scratch my face
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It was easy to get into, upload a photo, and play around with different looks.
author: Jenna P.
pros: This was a fun tool to see how you would look with certain products. The skincare line was really neat as you could see how you would improve over 1 week vs 24 weeks of consistent product use.
cons: The live video stream from my computer didn't work well, but it was most likely the low quality of my camera.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: how virtual makeup helped me pick my own shade.
description: my experience with it was really easy and I've been using it for a while now.
author: rayan I.
pros: it was never easy to find my own shade of makeup , especially when I had to keep on returning the product since it doesn't fit me . after using the virtual makeup try on , I had the right shade from the first time. It does do the job !
cons: there's nothing that I didn't like , it just made my life easier and all my makeup is my right shade.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Review as a tester of the platform
author: Lucas S.
pros: There are so many different options to use and test.The platform was also very easy to use and intuitive.
cons: Found it hard to find the glasses and headwear option.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Abi P.
